tasks.subject: Task 0: Set up upstream reference clone
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Have a byte-exact copy of `hollow/dotfiles@cef10b6` on disk for verbatim copying and diffing (including tracked modes).

**Files:**
- Create: `/tmp/hollow-dotfiles` (ephemeral working clone)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD` prints `cef10b6`.

**Verify:** `git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD` -> `cef10b6`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HEAD short hash is cef10b6"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Create opentofu/.gitignore (Ring 8 fix)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vendor `opentofu/.gitignore` byte-identical to upstream (mode `100644`), completing the opentofu port from Ring 8.

**Files:**
- Create: `opentofu/.gitignore`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Byte-identical to upstream, single line `credentials.tfrc.json`.
- [ ] Tracked mode `100644`, blob `58ca1b7955c723aa9e14337e2e3c9e68cd181adc`.

**Verify:** `git add opentofu/.gitignore && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s opentofu/.gitignore) <(git ls-files -s opentofu/.gitignore)` -> empty diff

```json:metadata
{"files": ["opentofu/.gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "git add opentofu/.gitignore && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s opentofu/.gitignore) <(git ls-files -s opentofu/.gitignore)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["byte-identical to upstream", "mode 100644, blob 58ca1b7"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add the claude tool section (cask + .zshrc)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `cask "claude"` to the `Brewfile` and the trimmed claude section to `zsh/.zshrc`, both byte-identical to upstream at their upstream-relative positions.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Brewfile` (insert `cask "claude"` after `cask "1password-cli"`)
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc` (insert claude section between the `bat` block and `# dircolors`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `cask "claude"` directly after `cask "1password-cli"`.
- [ ] claude `.zshrc` four lines byte-identical to upstream 333-336, between `bat` and `# dircolors`.
- [ ] `cp`/`claude_desktop_config.json` lines absent.
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` passes.

**Verify:** `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff <(sed -n '/^# claude: AI assistant by Anthropic/,/^export ENABLE_CLAUDEAI_MCP_SERVERS=true/p' zsh/.zshrc) <(sed -n '/^# claude: AI assistant by Anthropic/,/^export ENABLE_CLAUDEAI_MCP_SERVERS=true/p' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc) && ! grep -q claude_desktop_config.json zsh/.zshrc && grep -qx 'cask \"claude\"' Brewfile`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Brewfile", "zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff <(sed -n '/^# claude: AI assistant by Anthropic/,/^export ENABLE_CLAUDEAI_MCP_SERVERS=true/p' zsh/.zshrc) <(sed -n '/^# claude: AI assistant by Anthropic/,/^export ENABLE_CLAUDEAI_MCP_SERVERS=true/p' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc) && ! grep -q claude_desktop_config.json zsh/.zshrc && grep -qx 'cask \"claude\"' Brewfile", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cask claude after 1password-cli", "claude block byte-identical to upstream 333-336", "cp lines omitted", "zsh -n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Faithfulness audit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the whole ring is a faithful subset of upstream at `cef10b6`: vendored file mode+content matches, the `.zshrc` is a strict line-subset, and the Brewfile has no deviations.

**Files:**
- (No file changes â€” verification only.)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `opentofu/.gitignore` mode+blob match upstream.
- [ ] Every non-blank line of our `zsh/.zshrc` exists in upstream's (no `EXTRA:`).
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` passes.
- [ ] Every `brew`/`cask` line exists in upstream's Brewfile (empty `comm -23`).
- [ ] `git status` clean.

**Verify:** audit script prints `VENDORED OK`, `ZSHRC PARSES`, no `EXTRA:` lines, Brewfile checks, clean `git status --short`.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s opentofu/.gitignore) <(git ls-files -s opentofu/.gitignore) && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && comm -23 <(grep -vE '^[[:space:]]*$' zsh/.zshrc | sort -u) <(grep -vE '^[[:space:]]*$' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc | sort -u)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["vendored file mode+blob match", "zsh/.zshrc strict line-subset", "Brewfile no deviations", "git status clean"]}
```
